name: Fireship
oneLine: Creator of the #100SecondsOfCode format, delivering tightly-edited high-density tutorials on web and AI tooling.
bio: Jeff Delaney runs Fireship, a web-development channel known for fast-cut, joke-heavy explainers strictly clocked at 100 seconds. The channel launched its 100 Seconds of Code series in 2019 and has grown to 4M+ subscribers and 650M+ views by late 2025. Beyond shorts, Fireship publishes weekly tech news roundups (Code Report) and longer paid courses on fireship.io covering Firebase, Next.js, Flutter, and full-stack TypeScript.
style: Heavily-edited 100-second explainers and 5-10 minute Code Report news videos, packed with cuts, memes, and overlay text.
